package telemetry

import (
	"errors"
	"log"
	"math/rand"
	"time"
)

type Telemetry struct {
	// 假设包含遥测数据字段
}

type TelemetryWriter struct {
	tasks chan Telemetry
}

func NewTelemetryWriter(numWorkers, maxRetries int) *TelemetryWriter {
	tw := &TelemetryWriter{
		tasks: make(chan Telemetry, 100),
	}
	for i := 0; i < numWorkers; i++ {
		go tw.worker(maxRetries)
	}
	return tw
}

func (tw *TelemetryWriter) HandleBatch(records []Telemetry) {
	for _, record := range records {
		tw.tasks <- record
	}
}

func (tw *TelemetryWriter) worker(maxRetries int) {
	for record := range tw.tasks {
		retries := 0
		for {
			err := tw.write(record)
			if err == nil {
				break
			}
			retries++
			if retries > maxRetries {
				log.Printf("Failed to write telemetry after %d retries: %v", maxRetries, err)
				break
			}
			time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond << uint(retries)) // 指数退避
		}
	}
